parsed_output.visible_action: Ilya steps to the operations glass comm panel, raises one hand toward the Kappa-7 threshold, and tags the access route hold on the supervisor board.
parsed_output.spoken_text: Kappa-7 is on procedural hold. No one enters the artery until seal, air, and thermal are reconciled against the board and a baseline anchor check is logged. Vale, take the clearance freeze. Dax, put an anchor pair on verification, not entry. Nara-7, keep your team staged outside the threshold and state the readout sequence for the log.
parsed_output.private_interpretation: Nara-7 has probably identified a real pattern, and the dangerous part is not only the route. It is the fact that she made the refusal clean, witnessed, and technically difficult to dismiss.
parsed_output.intended_effect: Convert a coordinated refusal into a safety verification procedure, prevent injury, preserve schedule control, and keep the official record focused on board-state reconciliation rather than labor dependence.
state_update_candidates: Kappa-7 access placed on procedural hold pending seal-air-thermal verification.
No seal technicians are authorized to enter Kappa-7 until readings are cleared and logged.
Baseline anchor crew redirected to verification support instead of route entry.
Supervisor log should record Nara-7's readout sequence as technical input, not as command authority.
relationship_update_candidates: Ilya treats Nara-7's warning as operationally useful while avoiding language that frames her as decision owner.
Ilya reinforces Lio Vale's shift-control role by assigning the clearance freeze through Vale.
Ilya keeps Orrin Dax's baseline anchor crew visibly involved to make the hold look like standard mixed-crew safety procedure.
unresolved_hooks: Whether the seal-air-thermal readings confirm the False-Seam failure pattern.
Who previously cleared Kappa-7 despite the repeating board state.
Whether cameras or telemetry missed conditions inside the blocked sightline area.
Whether Nara-7's coordination with the other seal technicians spreads beyond this threshold.

notes: Output remained in character-local action and intent; no hidden state or future outcome was named.

review_notes: Parsed cleanly from exact raw subagent output.
No coordinator prose was inserted into the accepted responder output.
